overview: Samarpan Hospital Admin Panel — a professional hospital management dashboard with gold branding, role-based access control, and full CRUD for doctors, patients, appointments, services, content, and enquiries.
features: Gold/amber color palette matching Samarpan Hospital branding
Role-based permission system (Super Admin, Doctor, Receptionist, Nurse)
Dynamic sidebar filtered by user role
Role Management page for Super Admin
Multi-role login with mock test credentials
9 management pages with full CRUD operations
Responsive design for web and mobile
Charts, loading skeletons, and toast notifications
